name: Euro Yatirim Holding A.S.
summary: Euro Yatirim Holding A.S. provides financial services. The company offers various financial services, such as trading of derivatives, stocks, and bond-bills; repo and reverse repo transactions; credit securities trading services; public offering; and investment consultancy. It also provides portfolio management services to individuals and corporates. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
